key.name: save-path
key.description: Path to save the screen recordings in

key.name: capture-mode
key.description: Whether to record the whole display or a selected area

key.name: delay-seconds
key.description: Seconds to wait before starting the recording (0 = immediate)

key.name: duration-seconds
key.description: Seconds to record for before stopping automatically (0 = unlimited)

key.name: audio-enabled
key.description: Whether to capture audio alongside the screen recording

key.name: audio-device
key.description: PulseAudio/PipeWire source name to record from, or empty string for system default
